message:
feat(ftui-text): ligature policy system; fix rgb_to_256, scrollbar drag, widget metrics

Ligature support (ftui-text):
- Add LigatureMode enum (Auto/Enabled/Disabled) controlling how
  ShapingFallback handles ligatures per capability level
- Add RuntimeCapability.ligature_support field (FULL/HYBRID=true,
  TERMINAL=false) with display string update
- Add FontFeatures helpers: feature_value(), set_feature_value() with
  dedup, set_standard_ligatures(), standard_ligatures_enabled()
- Enabled+no-capability returns ShapedLineLayout::from_text() with
  SkippedByPolicy; Auto+no-capability injects explicit liga/clig=0
- Add ClusterMap test for ligature cluster boundary mapping
- Add bench_fallback_ligature_modes benchmark comparing mode x capability
- Update proptest strategy for 5-tuple with ligature_support bool

Color mapping fix (ftui-style/color.rs):
- Correct rgb_to_256 grayscale/cube boundary from r>248 to r>246 for
  nearest-neighbor correctness: 247+ maps to cube white (231), 246
  stays in grayscale ramp (255)

Scrollbar drag-release fix (ftui-widgets/scrollbar.rs):
- Return MouseResult::Scrolled on mouse-up after drag to commit final
  position instead of silently dropping it

Widget metrics fix (ftui-widgets/virtualized.rs):
- Set visible_count from fully_visible_items (integer division) instead
  of items_per_viewport (ceil division) for consistent scroll metrics

Tree widget formatting (ftui-widgets/tree.rs):
- Collapse log_expand_collapse call to single line

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-        |(prop, sub, hyph, track)| RuntimeCapability {

+        any::<bool>(),
+        any::<bool>(),
+        any::<bool>(),
+        any::<bool>(),
+        any::<bool>(),
+    )
+        .prop_map(|(prop, sub, hyph, track, ligature)| RuntimeCapability {
             proportional_fonts: prop,
             subpixel_positioning: sub,
             hyphenation_available: hyph,
             tracking_support: track,
+            ligature_support: ligature,
             max_paragraph_words: 0,
-        },
-    )
+        })
 }
